description: Configure a multi-warehouse supply chain by creating a new warehouse 'Downtown Pop-up' (short code: POP) resupplied from the 'San Francisco' warehouse. Establish a reordering rule for 'Acoustic Bloc Screen' at the 'Downtown Pop-up' location with a minimum quantity of 10 and a maximum of 30, then fulfill the resulting internal transfer from San Francisco to the new warehouse. Login: admin@example.com / admin
